metadata.title: The Missing Winner's Trophy
metadata.one_liner: The First Place trophy has vanished right after the big school race - and the winner didn't take it!

visual.palette: school blue, polished gold, and gym-floor brown

cover.summary: A school sports mystery with a missing trophy and a hidden closet.

narrative.premise: The Sports Day trophy vanished before the prize ceremony. Can you uncover who hid it before everyone gathers?
starting_knowledge: The trophy disappeared from the Sports Hall table.
Coach Rivera was called away just before it went missing.

locations.name: Sports Hall
locations.description: A big hall with polished lanes and an empty velvet trophy stand.
search_context: Chalk scuffs trail toward the side exit.
A blue team scarf is missing from the bench.

visual.summary: A school sports hall with race lanes, benches, and an empty trophy stand.

locations.name: Janitor's Closet
locations.description: A dark little room packed with buckets and mops.
search_context: The trophy is hidden behind two buckets.
A blue scarf is wrapped around it.

visual.summary: A cramped closet with buckets, mops, and a hidden shiny trophy.

locations.name: Cafeteria
locations.description: A noisy room full of celebration snacks and excited students.
search_context: Priya's warm juice carton sits on the table.
Her friends are celebrating with her.

visual.summary: A bustling cafeteria with juice cartons, trays, and cheering classmates.

locations.name: Coach's Office
locations.description: A tidy office with a desk full of race sheets and a ringing phone.
search_context: The office phone shows a 3:05 PM call.
A results sheet has Ethan's second place circled hard.

visual.summary: A neat office with race results, a desk phone, and coach paperwork.

roleplay.persona: A proud runner who tries to sound calm even when upset.
roleplay.background: He trained for months and came second.

characters.private_alibi: I was stretching at the back of the hall.
characters.private_motive: He could not bear to watch Priya receive the trophy.

visual.summary: A sporty boy in a blue vest missing his team scarf.

roleplay.persona: A cheerful winner who is upset her trophy vanished.
roleplay.background: She won the race fairly and wants to show the trophy to her family.

characters.private_alibi: I went straight to the cafeteria with my friends.
characters.private_motive: She wanted the trophy, but not hidden away.

visual.summary: A runner with gold ribbons and a bright yellow vest.

roleplay.persona: A loyal friend who struggles to hide when he knows too much.
roleplay.background: He cheered loudly for Ethan all day.

characters.private_alibi: I was at the water fountain down the corridor.
characters.private_motive: He might protect Ethan if needed.

visual.summary: A curly-haired boy in a blue vest with a plaster on one knee.

roleplay.persona: A brisk coach who wants quick, fair answers.
roleplay.background: She organized Sports Day and guarded the trophy table.

characters.private_alibi: I answered an unexpected office call.

visual.summary: A coach in a blue tracksuit with a whistle and clipboard.

evidence.player_text: The velvet trophy stand in the Sports Hall is empty.
evidence.fact_summary: The theft began at the hall display table.

evidence.player_text: The trophy is hidden in the Janitor's Closet with a blue scarf wrapped around it.
evidence.fact_summary: The trophy was hidden using Ethan's scarf.

evidence.player_text: Coach Rivera's office phone shows the call that pulled her away at 3:05.
evidence.fact_summary: Coach Rivera really left the hall at the key moment.

evidence.player_text: Ethan admits he could not stand seeing the trophy go to someone else.
evidence.fact_summary: Ethan reveals the jealousy behind the theft.

ground_truth.what_happened: Ethan grabbed the trophy when Coach Rivera left and hid it in the Janitor's Closet with his scarf.
ground_truth.why_it_happened: He was crushed to come second and could not bear Priya's ceremony.
ground_truth.explanation: Ethan used Coach Rivera's brief absence, wrapped the trophy in his scarf, and hid it away before the ceremony while Priya celebrated in the cafeteria.

suspect_truths.actual_activity: He took the trophy from the display table and hid it in the closet.
suspect_truths.stated_alibi: I was stretching at the back of the hall.
suspect_truths.motive: He was devastated to come second.

suspect_truths.actual_activity: She celebrated in the cafeteria with friends.
suspect_truths.stated_alibi: I went straight to the cafeteria with my friends.
suspect_truths.motive: She wanted the trophy but did not hide it.

suspect_truths.actual_activity: He headed to the water fountain.
suspect_truths.stated_alibi: I was at the water fountain down the corridor.
suspect_truths.motive: He might protect Ethan, but he did not take the trophy.

suspect_truths.actual_activity: She answered the office phone call.
suspect_truths.stated_alibi: I answered an unexpected office call.

timeline.summary: Coach Rivera leaves the Sports Hall for the office call.
Ethan grabs the trophy from the display table.
Ethan hides the trophy in the Janitor's Closet.
